---
title: "Code"
listing:
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents:
    - title: "agregR"
      image: motley/cards/agregR_logo.png
      path: https://rnmag.github.io/agregR/
      description: "Bayesian state-space models to extract latent support in Brazilian elections. Features pollster bias adjustment and automated weighting based on historical performance."
    - title: "Essential Classical Music"
      image: motley/cards/usp_logo.png
      path: https://rnmag.github.io/essential-classical-music/
      description: "This webapp reviews and summarizes dozens of hours of recording recommendations for several hundreds of classical pieces, with timestamped links to the full discussions."
    - title: "Brasil em Dados"
      image: motley/cards/brdados_logo.png
      path: https://github.com/brdados
      description: "A collaborative effort to share hard evidence of social progress in Brazil during the democratic period, born out of a need to counter rising authoritarian sentiment."
---

Sometimes ideas outlast the initial weekend of enthusiasm and accidentally turn into actual projects.
